series_metadata.series_description: These include, but are not limited to, the schedules, analyses, transcripts, memoranda, and other documents created to document test procedures, as well as documents collected as evidence, for use in the preparation of licensee and certified testing lab audits.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Unless converted into electronic format that has been verified as an accurate copy, maintain paper format three years or no longer of administrative value agency, whichever is longer ; Electronic: three years or no longer of administrative value agency, whichever is longer
